message.content:
I'm working in /Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next. I need to understand:

1. What playwright setup already exists in this app (check for playwright.config.ts, tests/ directory, existing test files)
2. How the homepage routing works - specifically what happens when a user visits "/" (the root/homepage)
3. What API call determines if a user has workspaces (look for API calls related to workspaces/organizations on the root route)
4. What the redirect logic looks like when a user has no workspace - they should be redirected to /new
5. Look at the app's router setup and any existing mocks infrastructure

Please read the actual code files and show me:
- The file at the root route handler (likely something like src/routes/index.tsx or src/routes/__root.tsx)
- Any API client calls related to fetching workspaces/organizations list
- The playwright config if it exists
- Any existing test files
- Package.json to see dependencies (especially request-mocking-protocol, msw, playwright)

Be thorough - I need the actual code to write the test.

content.text: Let me check the types and vite configuration to understand the build setup better:

content.content:
1	import { fileURLToPath, URL } from "node:url";
2	import tailwindcss from "@tailwindcss/vite";
3	import { devtools } from "@tanstack/devtools-vite";
4	import { tanstackStart } from "@tanstack/react-start/plugin/vite";
5	import viteReact from "@vitejs/plugin-react";
6	import { nitro } from "nitro/vite";
7	import { defineConfig } from "vite";
8	import viteTsConfigPaths from "vite-tsconfig-paths";
9	
10	const config = defineConfig(() => {
11	  const isVitest = process.env.VITEST === "true";
12	  const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === "development";
13	  const enableViteDevtools = isDev && false;
14	  const devHmrHost = process.env.VITE_DEV_HMR_HOST;
15	  const devHmrClientPort = process.env.VITE_DEV_HMR_CLIENT_PORT;
16	  const devHmrProtocol = process.env.VITE_DEV_HMR_PROTOCOL;
17	
18	  return {
19	    plugins: [
20	      ...(enableViteDevtools ? devtools() : []),
21	      // this is the plugin that enables path aliases
22	      viteTsConfigPaths({
23	        projects: ["./tsconfig.json"],
24	      }),
25	      tailwindcss(),
26	      tanstackStart(),
27	      viteReact(),
28	      ...(isVitest
29	        ? []
30	        : [
31	            nitro({
32	              // Work around a nitro-nightly externals bug with packages that
33	              // contain null branches in `exports` (e.g. msw/interceptors).
34	              noExternals: true,
35	            }),
36	          ]),
37	    ],
38	    server: {
39	      allowedHosts: ["anedot.me", "public.anedot.me", "localhost"],
40	      cors: true,
41	      ...(devHmrHost
42	        ? {
43	            hmr: {
44	              clientPort: devHmrClientPort
45	                ? Number.parseInt(devHmrClientPort, 10)
46	                : 443,
47	              host: devHmrHost,
48	              overlay: true,
49	              protocol: devHmrProtocol ?? "wss",
50	              timeout: 60000,
51	            },
52	          }
53	        : {}),
54	      host: true,
55	      port: 3210,
56	      strictPort: true,
57	      watch: {
58	        ignored: [
59	          "*.log",
60	          ".DS_Store",
61	          ".claude/**",
62	          ".git/**",
63	          ".github/**",
64	          ".output/**",
65	          ".tanstack/**",
66	          ".turbo/**",
67	          ".vscode/**",
68	          "dist/**",
69	          "node_modules/**",
70	          "playwright-report/**",
71	          "tests/**",
72	        ],
73	      },
74	    },
75	    test: {
76	      environment: "jsdom",
77	      globals: true,
78	      setupFiles: ["@workspace/test-utils/vitest"],
79	      passWithNoTests: true,
80	      exclude: [
81	        "**/node_modules/**",
82	        "**/dist/**",
83	        "**/.{idea,git,cache,output,temp}/**",
84	        "**/playwright-report/**",
85	        "**/test-results/**",
86	        "tests/integration/**",
87	        "**/*.spec.*",
88	      ],
89	    },
90	    optimizeDeps: {
91	      exclude: [
92	        "msw",
93	        "@mswjs/interceptors",
94	        "@tanstack/start-server-core",
95	        "@tanstack/start-client-core",
96	        "@tanstack/react-start",
97	      ],
98	    },
99	    resolve: {
100	      alias: {
101	        "@": fileURLToPath(new URL("./src", import.meta.url)),
102	      },
103	    },
104	  };
105	});
106	
107	export default config;
108

1	VITE_API_HOSTNAME=http://localhost:3210
2	VITE_ENABLE_RMP=true
3	# E2E: skip OAuth; org API token comes from dev placeholder while RMP mocks JSON.
4	VITE_ORG_NEXT_BYPASS_AUTH=true
5	VITE_AUTH_APP_URL=http://localhost:3208
6	VITE_AUTH_CLIENT_ID=local-client

content.text: Perfect! Let me now look at the workspace/new route to see what happens when there's no workspace:
